topic: The down escalator at the mall runs far longer than the floor below allows.
title: The Escalator That Went Too Far Down | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The down escalator at the mall runs far longer than the floor below allows.
scenes.image_prompt: A long mall escalator descending into dim light, metal steps gleaming, empty handrails, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is the same mall I have walked through for years.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty shopping mall corridor at closing, shuttered storefronts, polished floor reflecting dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Upper floor to ground floor. A short ride, always.
scenes.image_prompt: Close still of escalator steps emerging from the comb plate, brushed metal, faint overhead glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One late night, the ride down just kept going.
scenes.image_prompt: View down a steep escalator vanishing into shadow, the bottom not visible, dim emergency light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The floor I knew passed by. The steps kept descending.
scenes.image_prompt: A mall floor seen from a moving escalator, lights dimming below, deep shadow swallowing the steps, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I counted. Three times longer than it should ever be.
scenes.image_prompt: Endless escalator steps stretching downward, handrail vanishing into darkness, faint flicker of lights, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I tried to climb back up. The steps carried me down faster.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure's hand gripping an escalator handrail, steps moving downward in motion blur, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the bottom was the same mall floor. Dark and emptier.
scenes.image_prompt: A dim copy of a mall floor, identical storefronts but all unlit and shuttered, cold shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every up escalator there only went further down.
scenes.image_prompt: Multiple mall escalators all descending into darkness, no upward path, faint emergency glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: In a dark window I saw my own reflection, riding up, leaving.
scenes.image_prompt: A darkened storefront window reflecting an escalator with a faint silhouette ascending away, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found a stairwell and ran up until daylight cracked through.
scenes.image_prompt: A grey concrete stairwell with faint daylight at the top, worn steps, harsh shadow below, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The mall closed years ago. I read that this morning, online.
scenes.image_prompt: An abandoned mall exterior at dawn, dead escalators visible through dusty glass, overgrown entrance, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing
